relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file documents a complaint escalation for fraud/unauthorized transaction review, while the outbound file represents a lending decision override approval with detailed credit metrics. These serve fundamentally different business purposes: one is a compliance escalation workflow, the other is a credit decisioning override. While both involve risk_and_compliance as a system, the data domains, message types, and field structures are incompatible. The outbound file requires loan application details, credit scores, debt-to-income ratios, and approval hierarchies that have no counterpart in a complaint escalation schema.
